title: anisomeles bundeyensis
intro: Anisomeles bundeyensis, also known as Bundey's Anisomeles, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Anisomeles bundeyensis include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Anisomeles bundeyensis can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, its leaves may be used in traditional medicine to create a paste or tincture for topical application.
